subtitle: Doors opening — build the pipeline

planetInfluences.summary: Opens doors and widens the pipeline

tropicalReading.body: Today is Expansion — use the opening to build structural leverage, not to chase closure. Move one document, relationship, or pitch forward; leave formal commitment for later. Capricorn Rising keeps the hierarchy clear: the 12th-House annual profection is still a foundation year, and the valuation cycle is one you work, not a predetermined one. Uranus sextile Jupiter opens a practical door; Pluto square the Midheaven exposes authority pressure. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut. Build the 2nd-House North Node self-valuation arc; ignore noise.

traditionalReading.body:
Today is expansion — open the right door, then keep the paperwork clean. The monthly profection is the 9th whole-sign house, Virgo; Mercury is lord of the month, natally in domicile and exaltation, and supported by Mercury sextile Mercury, not pressed by a hard classical transit. With Jupiter lord of the year and in-sect, lean into outreach, study, documents, and advisory conversations; ignore noise, haste, and overpromising. Mars is heat in the engine, not the steering wheel.

Moon today — Moon in Libra, your 10th whole-sign house. Put visible work in order, make the public-facing choice cleaner, and do not let approval-seeking set the agenda.

vedicReading.body:
Today is Expansion — useful opening with pressure underneath. Use Mercury sextile Mercury to clean the move plan, tighten messages, and separate real leverage from noise. Rahu square Mars makes speed expensive; discharge friction through logistics, not debate. For Sagittarius Lagna, build pipeline now and defer signatures until the stronger Aug 12-Sep 5 external window. Today is a workbench, not a finish line.

Moon today — Moon in Virgo, your 10th house, nakshatra Hasta pada 2. Prioritize visible execution, document the next move step, and watch for status pressure turning a simple task into unnecessary over-control.

baziReading.body: Today is Ding-Mao Rabbit — peer Fire on your core Rabbit, with Jia-Wu month Resource feeding visibility. Move the useful offer forward, make the ask, and keep the workstream narrow. Ding doubling your Ding day master raises Companion heat: allies, rivals, and comparison all get louder. In the Wu-Zi Da Yun and 2026 Horse peer-fire field, favor Output that proves value. Fire is a torch, not a brushfire. Move visibly; do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into parallel fires.

tarotCard.name: The Chariot
tarotCard.body: The Chariot — move with control, not speed; drive one direction with the reins tight. Today is Expansion: build leverage and document the move, but keep formal commitments for later. Jupiter carries the field, and Saturn is the constraint to respect. Uranus sextile Jupiter is the sharpest aspect today — let it set the operating language. The Jupiter Return sits 20 days out, so treat today as part of that setup.

tropicalMonthly.body: Your dominant frame is preparation: Capricorn Rising in a 12th-House annual profection means build structural leverage quietly, not chase proof. The Cancer solar month puts attention on agreements, counterparties, and negotiation hygiene; use it to clarify terms, pricing, and access. July 12 resets the partnership cycle, but Jupiter only amplifies what has already been positioned; July 16 makes areas where competence and old sensitivity overlap more visible, so handle feedback clinically. This is scaffolding month: measure twice, load the beams, and leave the ribbon-cutting for later. The 2nd-House North Node arc keeps the real issue on self-valuation, not approval, and this is a valuation cycle you work, not a predetermined one. After the Sun enters Leo around July 23, shift from private preparation toward selective visibility, but formalize weight-bearing commitments after late August.

traditionalMonthly.body: The dominant frame is Jupiter as lord of the year in a 12th-house Sagittarius year: build quietly, reduce waste, and prepare the pipeline before public commitments harden later. This month’s profection is the 9th whole-sign house, Virgo, with Mercury as lord of the month; Mercury is natally in Virgo, in domicile and exaltation, so the best use is planning, writing, study, legal/credential review, and precise long-range positioning. Mercury is supported by soft contact, while Mars also trines Mercury, so action helps if it stays technical, scoped, and documented. Mars-Venus is friction looking for a build, not a fight. Watch overediting, private pressure, and scattered momentum. Around June 30, the month hands to Libra and Venus ruling the 10th: start formalizing visibility, presentation, and professional asks, but do not overpromise before the support is real.

vedicMonthly.body: Dominant frame: Moon–Venus–Jupiter for Sagittarius Lagna, with Sade Sati / Small Panoti active through 2027-06-02, so growth is real but must pass through constraint, duty, and cash-flow discipline. From now through June 30, use the active External Manifestation Window to build pipeline, clarify agreements, and strengthen property/work systems; do not force final commitments yet. The transit Moon starts in Hasta and will run the full nakshatra cycle, so treat mood spikes as scheduling signals, not strategy. Saturn is the quiet edit, not the loud cut: remove weak obligations before adding new ones. What matters is leverage for the Aug 12–Sep 5 strongest window; what does not matter is short-term emotional weather. Build documentation, repair plans, relationship/value clarity, and ignore pressure to declare outcomes early.

baziMonthly.body: Dominant field: 戊子 Wu-Zi Da Yun under 2026 丙午 Ben Ming peer-fire; today, June 22, 丁卯 favors focused Companion action fed by Rabbit Wood Resource. Use 甲午 month for preparation: build pipeline, sharpen offers, publish selectively, and ignore noisy comparison. On July 7, 小暑 shifts into 乙未: Resource moves into Output, so convert planning into usable systems. July 7 to September 7 is the visible-move corridor, with July 12 as a concentration point; this month sets leverage for heavier commitments after late August. The Horse field is a furnace with too many open doors: move visibly, but do not turn competition into compulsion or scatter into too many parallel fires.

tacticalSlots.note: Year branch repeats in 2026 — drive and visibility run hot
Natal month AND hour branch — structural pressure is real
Your true core branch — finesse, curation, clean expression over force
Mnemonic overlay only — not a natal pillar (literal hour branch is Monkey)

consensus.primaryAction: Build structural leverage and keep the paperwork clean.

todaysInsight: Build leverage through pipeline, positioning, and repair work. Do not lock final commitments under pressure.

opportunity: Jupiter is lord of the year (benefic regime)
approaching benefic window: Jupiter return — chapter reset (20d)
pressure: Sade Sati (Small Panoti) — pressure on foundations
momentum: BaZi Da Yun shift within 85 days
